---
title: "Furrballs Documentation"
---

## Overview

Furrballs is a NUMA-aware, high-performance caching library in C++.

Use this site to read the current technical whitepaper and follow project progress.

## Start Here

- [Read the whitepaper](whitepaper.qmd) | [PDF](whitepaper.pdf)
- [Read the REMARC paper](remarc-paper.qmd) | [PDF](remarc-paper.pdf)
- [Repository README](../README.md)

## Build Locally

```bash
cd docs
quarto render
quarto preview
```
